tables.table_title: Comparison of Traditional ReCAPTCHA vs. NoCaptcha ReCAPTCHA v3
tables.table_note: The results indicate that NoCaptcha reCAPTCHA v3 demonstrated a higher detection rate (97%) compared to traditional reCAPTCHA (95%). However, there was a slight decrease in user satisfaction (85% vs. 75%) and user engagement (88% vs. 85%) in the NoCaptcha reCAPTCHA v3 group.
